channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Northwestern University to settle lawsuit over football program hazing allegations
item.description: Northwestern University has agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by students against the school and former head coach Pat Fitzgerald, who alleged hazing incidents took place in the football program, but the settlement does not resolve Fitzgerald's lawsuit against the university.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Billie Jean King immortalized in bronze with star on Hollywood Walk of Fame
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Billie Jean King became the first woman to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in the new sports entertainment category on Monday and she was joined by friends Magic Johnson and Oscar-winning actor Jamie Lee Curtis.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran said in an upcoming documentary series that two years before his 2024 All-Star season, the pressures of the sport led him to intense bouts of depression and an attempted suicide.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Hightower, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Maine sues Trump admin over funding freeze for refusal to keep trans athletes out of women's sports
item.description: Maine filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Agriculture over a funding freeze the agency levied on the state for its refusal to alter its participation policy in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Vote now: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week
item.description: Top Bay Area athletes are featured in the Bay Area News Group's girls athlete of the week poll. Vote now and see who made the cut to be nominated this week. Athletes come from across the Mercury News and East Bay Times coverage area.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Great starting pitching stretches not enough for the White Sox and Reds early this season
item.description: The Cincinnati Reds and Chicago White Sox both got brilliant stretches from their starting rotations — and largely wasted them.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sagstrom beats Coughlin 1-up in T-Mobile Match Play to end 5-year drought on LPGA Tour
item.description: NORTH LAS VEGAS, Nev. (AP) — The five-year wait to end her LPGA Tour victory drought appeared to be a matter of time when Madelene Sagstrom went 4-up just six holes into the final of the T-Mobile Match Play. Then it nearly got away from her, and Sagstrom even briefly fell behind at one point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nebraska wins $300,000 prize in College Basketball Crown tournament
item.description: The Nebraska Cornhuskers men's basketball program will forever remember their 2025 trip to Las Vegas after they became $300,000 richer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hamlin takes the lead out of pits and holds off Byron in overtime to win at Darlington Raceway
item.description: DARLINGTON, S.C. (AP) — Denny Hamlin did his job so his pit crew could do its most stellar stop at the perfect time. Hamlin came into the pits after a final caution in third place and told himself to hit every mark, then let his guys take over.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke 70-67 in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Sorry guys, “Phi Slama Jama” is already taken. How ’bout something simple, like “Comeback Kids.” “National champs” might be a possibility, too.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC stays alive with 4-1 victory over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is probably not going to make the NHL playoffs, but they are not going down without a fight. Karel Vejmelka made 32 saves for Utah in a 4-1 win against the the top team in the NHL, the Winnipeg Jets, at Delta Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Carpenter and Torkelson homer as Tigers beat White Sox 7-2 and drop Chicago to 2-6
item.description: Kerry Carpenter homered for the third time in two games and Spencer Torkelson had a home run and a double Saturday as the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-2 for their fourth win in five games following an opening three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Keanu Tanuvasa, Carsen Ryan go from Utah to BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last year at this time, Keanu Tanuvasa and Carsen Ryan were both gearing up for Utah's first season in the Big 12 Conference. Now, they're getting ready for Utah's biggest rival.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL to use camera technology to measure first downs next season, approves more rule changes
item.description: The NFL announced a multitude of rule changes on Tuesday, including a new way to measure first downs for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Jared Bush, Fox 5

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Carlsbad native earns spot in WSL Challenger Series
item.description: Reid Van Wagoner, a 15-year-old surfer from Carlsbad, has secured a spot in the 2025 Challenger Series after winning a 10-point ride at Soup Bowl in Barbados.
item.dc:creator: Alysse Dodge, Fox 5

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
